description: Identify the changes in the LSP configuration communication and write an implementation plan to support it. use LS_PROTOCOL_VERSION 25.

scenarios.name: Should serialize DidChangeConfigurationParams using LspConfigurationParam structure
scenarios.description: Verify that getSettings returns the new LspConfigurationParam structure

scenarios.name: Should handle $/snyk.configuration notification
scenarios.description: Verify that SnykLanguageClient.snykConfiguration updates the local SnykApplicationSettingsStateService properties according to the canonical pflag names

scenarios.name: Should update FolderConfigSettings via $/snyk.configuration
scenarios.description: Verify that SnykLanguageClient.snykConfiguration updates the FolderConfigSettings with the passed folderConfigs instead of the old $/snyk.folderConfigs endpoint
